domain.description: Subject domain of the whitepaper (e.g. skill-frameworks, payment-networks)

depth.description: Level of detail: standard (8-12 paragraphs) or comprehensive (15-20 paragraphs)

description: Format findings as a long-form whitepaper preserving the full evidence chain, then deliver as a Word document (.docx) — reads all workspace research, applies lens concern self-assessment, every claim traceable to source. Evidence markdown + professional document delivery.
usage: write a whitepaper, long-form report, detailed document with evidence, comprehensive writeup, full paper, in-depth analysis document, professional whitepaper
